ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the document */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the document was published */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the document */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the document */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the document */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Total word count of the document */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the document */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of cover (e.g., hardcover, paperback, digital) */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating for the document */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the document */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reading_speeds" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading speed */,
  "speed_name" TEXT /* Name of the reading speed category */,
  "words_per_minute" INTEGER /* Words per minute at this reading speed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reading speed category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the default reading speed for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reading_time_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading time estimate */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading speed */,
  "estimated_time_minutes" REAL /* Estimated reading time in minutes */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Word count of the document at this reading speed */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Page count of the document at this reading speed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the estimate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_time_estimates_speed_id FOREIGN KEY ("speed_id") REFERENCES reading_speeds ("speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_time_estimates_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "preferred_speed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred reading speed */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "total_reading_time" REAL /* Total time spent reading by the user */,
  "total_documents_read" INTEGER /* Total number of documents read by the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_speed_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_speed_id") REFERENCES reading_speeds ("speed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session ended */,
  "pages_read" INTEGER /* Number of pages read during the session */,
  "device" TEXT /* Type of device used for reading */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user during the session */,
  "reading_speed" TEXT /* Actual reading speed during the session */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_sessions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reading_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_speed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's preferred reading speed */,
  "preferred_categories" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred categories */,
  "preferred_languages" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred languages */,
  "preferred_document_types" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of preferred document types */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of notification preferences */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_speed_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_speed_id") REFERENCES reading_speeds ("speed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
